title: Magical Roast Portuguese Rhubarb Roast
description: A traditional Portuguese dish featuring forced rhubarb and roast, perfect for a hangover cure, this herbal and flaky meal is gluten-free friendly. It combines the tender flavors of roast with the tartness of rhubarb.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the pork roast with salt, black pepper, and minced garlic.
In a large Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium heat and sear the pork roast until browned on all sides.
Add the rosemary sprigs, forced rhubarb, and potatoes to the Dutch oven.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven and roast for 45 minutes.
Reduce the oven temperature to 375 degrees Fahrenheit and continue roasting for an additional 30 minutes.
Remove the Dutch oven from the oven and let the roast rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
Serve the sliced roast with the roasted rhubarb and potatoes.
